seo.title: UrMedz — Authentic Medicines, Delivered to Your Door
seo.description: India's most trusted pharmaceutical retail and fulfilment company. 25+ stores, 10,000+ orders daily, and 80,000 SKUs — all sourced from licensed distributors.

hero.headline: Authentic medicines, at your door.
hero.tagline: A network of 25 retail stores and India's largest pharma fulfilment centres — delivering trusted medicines to you.

about.description: UrMedz is building India's most trusted pharmaceutical infrastructure — connecting patients with authentic, affordable medicines through a network of licensed retail stores, hi-tech fulfilment centres, and trained pharmacists. Founded in Bengaluru in 2024, we believe that access to genuine medicine should never be a question of geography or cost.

pillars.title: 50,000 sft fulfilment
pillars.body: Purpose-built centres in Bengaluru and Hyderabad. The widest array of medicines — sourced, traced, dispatched.

pillars.title: Affordable alternatives
pillars.body: Same composition. Often a fraction of the cost. Our engine surfaces the best generic and brand equivalents for every prescription.

pillars.title: Pharmacist-reviewed
pillars.body: Every order is checked by a registered pharmacist for dosage, interactions and validity — before it leaves the counter.

services.title: Retail Stores
services.description: A network of 25 neighbourhood pharmacies stocked with authentic, licensed medicines — and growing across South India.

services.title: Quick Commerce
services.description: India's largest network of pharma dark stores — enabling same-day and on-demand medicine delivery directly to your door.

services.title: Hi-Tech Fulfilment
services.description: State-of-the-art fulfilment centres with cold-chain handling, batch traceability, and audit-ready dispatch built in.

services.title: E-commerce Partner
services.description: India's largest pharmaceutical fulfilment partner for e-commerce platforms — accurate, fast, and fully compliant.

items.title: Authenticity at the source
items.description: Every medicine on our shelves is sourced from licensed distributors and traceable to its manufacturer — no grey-market shortcuts.

items.title: Scale where it matters
items.description: A retail-plus-fulfilment footprint means the medicine you need is rarely more than a few kilometres away.

items.title: Infrastructure built for compliance
items.description: Cold-chain handling, batch traceability and audit-ready dispatch — built into every store and centre.

items.title: An AI-assisted platform
items.description: Our SaaS platform helps partner pharmacies forecast demand, manage inventory and stay compliant — quietly, in the background.

steps.title: Browse or upload your prescription
steps.description: Search our catalogue or upload a doctor's prescription — we'll match it to authentic, in-stock medicines from licensed pharmacists.

steps.title: A licensed pharmacist reviews your order
steps.description: Every prescription order is reviewed by one of our qualified pharmacists before it's dispensed — no exceptions.

steps.title: Delivered or ready for pickup
steps.description: Collect from your nearest UrMedz store or receive doorstep delivery — often same-day through our quick-commerce network.

items.question: Where do you source your medicines from?
items.answer: All medicines stocked by UrMedz are sourced exclusively from manufacturers and distributors licensed by the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO). Every batch is traceable from manufacturer to shelf — we do not carry grey-market or unlicensed stock.

items.question: How do you handle prescriptions?
items.answer: Prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription, reviewed by one of our in-house licensed pharmacists. You can upload a digital copy via our app or website, or present the original at any UrMedz retail store.

items.question: Which areas do you deliver to?
items.answer: We currently deliver same-day and next-day across Bengaluru through our quick-commerce network, with select pin codes covered in other South Indian cities. Check the app for live coverage in your area.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: Prescription medicines cannot be returned once dispensed, in line with Indian pharmaceutical regulations. For OTC products in sealed, undamaged condition, returns are accepted within 7 days of purchase at any retail store or via our support team.

items.question: How can I get in touch?
items.answer: You can reach our support team at care@urmedz.in or call +91 80 4567 0049 during business hours (9 am – 9 pm, Mon–Sat). For urgent queries, the in-app chat connects you to a pharmacist directly.

compliance.disclaimer: UrMedz Retail Pvt. Ltd. is a licensed pharmaceutical retail and fulfilment company. The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. All medicines are dispensed by licensed pharmacists in accordance with applicable Indian pharmaceutical regulations, and prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription. Consult a qualified medical practitioner before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.
